title: ConSpan culvert reach — linked HEC-RAS steady profiles

scope.notes: Single main-stem reach with inline ConSpan arch culvert. No junctions.

linked_project.notes: HEC-RAS example project (legacy 3.x lineage). STREAM-1D inputs in conspan_project_12.json were mapped from this geometry file.

reference.notes: ConSpan.csv is a profile export from running the linked .g01 + .p01 + .f01 project. Use --live-ras to re-run HEC-RAS when installed (requires ras-commander and a compatible HEC-RAS version).
